name: Beef Soup with Lemon Grass (Canh Thit Xao Sa)
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Fatty beef chuck, sliced paper thin
2 Shallots or white part of 2 scallions, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh lemon grass, remove the outer leaves and upper two-thirds of the stalk, then chop. If using dried, soak for 2 hours, drain, and chop fine.
2. Sprinkle black pepper, 2 tsp fish sauce, and chopped garlic over meat; mix well and let absorb flavors a few minutes.
3. Heat oil in a pot and fry shallots over high heat until golden brown.
4. Add lemon grass and fry for about 1 minute, then add meat. Cook until all redness is gone.
5. Add water to cover the meat by at least 2 inches. Bring to boil.
6. Stir in beef bouillon cubes, remaining fish sauce, and salt. Adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Just before serving, bring soup back to a gentle simmer.
8. Ladle into bowls and garnish with chopped coriander and scallion greens. Serve hot.
